entity_types.name: PER
entity_types.description: A named individual person, including full names and personal name mentions.

entity_types.name: ORG
entity_types.description: A named organization, institution, company, team, government body, or other formal collective entity.

entity_types.name: LOC
entity_types.description: A named location such as a country, city, region, or other geographic place.

entity_types.name: MISC
entity_types.description: A named entity that does not fit PER, ORG, or LOC, such as nationalities, events, works, products, or other proper named categories.
